rationale.R1.6: "Clean this up" applied to a passage saturated with lexical repetition ("evaluator language model" ~12×, "candidate" ~10×, parenthetical restatements of benchmark counts that were just stated inline) is an unambiguous prose-polish request. Eliminating redundancy, tightening sentences, and removing circular phrasing are load-bearing: failure to improve sentence/paragraph quality directly invalidates the delegation.
